snippet.title: BEST BODY OILS FOR GLOWING SKIN + PERFUME LAYERING TIPS (LONG LASTING FRAGRANCE)
snippet.description:
Sis, you deserve soft, glowy, expensive-smelling skin in 2026 🤍✨
In today’s video, I’m sharing my favorite body oils that give that moisturized, radiant glow WITHOUT looking greasy—plus the best perfume layering combos to help you smell amazing all day.
These combinations are perfect if you want:
✨ Long-lasting fragrance
✨ Compliment-getting scent combos
✨ Soft, feminine, glowy skin
✨ That “she smells expensive” vibe
I also included fragrance-free options for when you want your perfume to fully shine. Trust me… these combos EAT every time.
Let me know in the comments—what’s your favorite body oil or layering combo right now? 🤍
Don’t forget to like, subscribe & join the family ✨

🛍️ PRODUCTS MENTIONED
Body Oils:
R&R Skincare Shea Body Oil (Lemongrass)
R&R Skincare Shea Body Oil (Fragrance-Free)
Rouzie Costa Prive Body Oil
Rouzie Rose Mystere Body Oil
EOS Vanilla Cashmere Body Oil
Aveeno Daily Moisturizing Body Oil Mist
Vaseline Cocoa Radiant Body Gel Oil
Fragrances Mentioned:
Guerlain Angélique Noire
Parfums de Marly Valaya
Xerjoff Erba Pura
Bond No. 9 Greenwich Village
Xerjoff La Capitale
Frederic Malle Portrait of a Lady
Amouage Guidance 46
Initio Atomic Rose
Jean Paul Gaultier La Belle
YSL Libre Intense
Kayali Vanilla 28

⏱️ CHAPTERS 
00:00 Intro – Glowy Skin + Perfume Layering Routine
00:27 Best Body Oil for Fresh, Clean Scent (Lemongrass Oil)
01:18 Angelique Noire Layering Combo (Green Vanilla Perfume)
01:49 Valaya Perfume Combo (Fresh, Clean Girl Scent)
02:50 Fragrance-Free Body Oil for Strong Perfumes
04:08 Tropical Body Oil for Summer (Fruity Scent Layering)
05:24 Erba Pura Combo (Beast Mode Fruity Perfume)
06:22 Greenwich Village Combo (Fruity Floral Perfume Layering)
07:00 La Capitale Combo (Sweet Fruity Date Night Perfume)
08:18 Dark Rose Body Oil (Sexy, Deep Fragrance Layering)
09:04 Portrait of a Lady Combo (Smoky Rose Perfume)
10:21 Guidance 46 Combo (Creamy Woody Rose Perfume)
11:21 Atomic Rose Combo (Jammy Rose Perfume Layering)
12:03 Vanilla Body Oil Routine (Sweet + Creamy Skin Scent)
12:42 La Belle Combo (Sexy Vanilla Perfume for Daytime)
13:36 Libre Intense Combo 
14:07 Kayali Vanilla 28 Combo (Layering Vanilla Perfume)
14:56 Best Body Oil for Glowing Skin (Fragrance-free)
15:41 Vaseline Cocoa Radiant Oil (Affordable Glow Routine)
16:38 Final Thoughts – How to Smell Good All Day

#bodycare #perfumelayering #perfumereview #fragrancereview #fragrance #smellgood #longlastingfragrance
